# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind Code Breach: Cyberpunk Update Brings Visuals, AI, and UI polish
- Summary: Showcase the Code Breach cyberpunk redesign with AI-assisted problems, new tower types, and a refreshed UI all tied to recent updates.
- Slug: codegrind-cyberpunk-code-breach-upgrade
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-cyberpunk-code-breach-upgrade
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-05-24-codegrind-cyberpunk-code-breach-upgrade.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind combines LeetCode-style challenges with a cyberpunk tower-defense aesthetic, now featuring enhanced AI assistance, upgraded visuals, and streamlined problem-solving workflows to boost learning and engagement.
- CTA: Dive into Code Breach’s updated experience and level up your DSA practice today.
- Visual brief: Static promotional poster featuring Code Breach cyberpunk visual overhaul: neon city backdrop, towers representing code concepts (ForLoop, WhileLoop, IfCondition, Function) with glowing code snippets; prominent AI assistant panel; teaser text: 'Cyberpunk Makeover Complete' and 'New AI-assisted challenges'.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
